log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a UPX compressed PE32 executable, likely a spreader, and was run in three different sandboxes. I should investigate the network activity to see if it communicates with any C2 servers.

The network activity is empty, which suggests that the sample might not be communicating with any C2 servers. I should investigate the registry changes to see if it tries to persist itself on the syst

The sample tries to persist itself by adding a registry key to the Run key, which will execute the ijjmk.exe file. I should investigate the dropped files to see if ijjmk.exe is a component of the samp
The sample drops a large number of files, many of which are executable. I should investigate the process activity to see if any of these files are executed.
The sample creates the rmabyb.exe process, which is likely a component of the sample. I should investigate the CAPA behaviors to see if there are any other notable capabilities.
